wiki.name: TypeScript Full-Stack
wiki.description: A full-stack TypeScript showcase featuring a React frontend, Nx monorepo structure, Dockerized services, and a SQL-backed Node.js API.

wiki.name: Java Full-Stack
wiki.description: A Java and Spring Boot full-stack project demonstrating robust backend architecture, cloud deployment on AWS, and SQL data management.

wiki.name: C++ Full Stack and JUCE
wiki.description: A C++ and JUCE-based full-stack concept for music software development, showcasing audio processing capabilities.
